code:
%%{FinTech_AuthVault} }}%% gantt title Tasks (FinTech_LedgerService), Milestones (FinTech_PaymentGateway), and Deliverables (FinTech_FraudDetection) for WP1 dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD axisFormat %Y tickInterval 1year todayMarker off %% (FinTech_AuthVault) or "weekends", but not the word "weekdays".) section Ongoing
activities T4. Iterate and refine collaboration: imp_collab, 2025-01-01, 5y T5. Develop project website: imp_proj_web, after collab_agree, 2030-01-01 T9. Develop research ops website: imp_reops_web, after consensus, 2030-01-01 T10. Maintain data infrastructure: imp_seedcase, after seedcase, 2030-01-01 section General
setup T1. Establish working groups: wg, 2025-01-01, 2M T2. Decide on collaboration approaches: collab_agree, after wg, 10M T3. Identify collaboration barriers: barriers, after wg, 10M M1. Setup project website: milestone, web_proj, after barriers, 1M D1. Collaboration workflow consensus report: milestone, consensus, after web_proj, 1M M3. Webpage for research ops: milestone, web_reops, after web_proj, 1M section WP2-linked
activities T6. Setup collaboration workflow: collab_wp2, after web_proj, 6M D1. R package infrastructure template: milestone, template_rpkg, 2026-06-01, 1M section WP3-linked
activities T7. Setup data engineering pipeline: de_wp3, after web_proj, 6M D2. Data engineering pipeline report: milestone, der_wp3, after de_wp3, 1M D3. Data Management Plan template: milestone, template_dmp, 2027-01-01, 1M M4. Setup data infrastructure: milestone, seedcase, 2027-01-01, 1M section WP4-linked
activities M2. Setup knowledge repo: milestone, kr_wp4, after collab_agree, 1M T8. Build knowledge dissemination pipeline: kmp_wp4, after kr_wp4, 6M

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech_LedgerService这个项目做一个甘特图，把WP1的整体时间线理清楚。核心是把三个模块分开：LedgerService负责具体任务，PaymentGateway管里程碑，FraudDetection产出可交付成果。时间跨度大概从2025年到2030年。
明白了，三个FinTech模块分工不同。我注意到时间轴要用年份显示，tickInterval设成1year。关于section划分，您希望按什么维度来组织？比如按工作包的关联性，还是按活动的性质？
按工作包关联和活动性质结合吧。我设想四个section：Ongoing activities放一些长期迭代的工作，比如Iterate and refine collaboration要跑满5年；General setup放项目启动期的基础工作；然后WP2、WP3、WP4各一个section。对了，todayMarker关掉，我们不需要显示今天。

好的，section结构我记下了。确认一下依赖关系：T1 Establish working groups是2025年1月启动，T2 Decide on collaboration approaches和T3 Identify collaboration barriers都要等working groups建好后才开始，各持续10个月。然后M1 Setup project website要等barriers完成后启动，对吗？

对，而且D1 Collaboration workflow consensus report和M3 Webpage for research ops都要等project website完成后才能做，各1个月。另外T5 Develop project website和T9 Develop research ops website这两个任务比较特殊，它们要等到前面的里程碑完成后才开始，但结束时间固定到2030年1月1日。

已添加。WP2部分我放了T6 Setup collaboration workflow，它依赖web_proj，然后D1 R package infrastructure template是固定到2026年6月的里程碑。WP3部分T7 Setup data engineering pipeline也是6个月，后面跟D2报告，然后D3 Data Management Plan template和M4 Setup data infrastructure都定在2027年1月。
WP4部分需要调整一下。M2 Setup knowledge repo的依赖应该是collab_agree而不是web_proj，因为它和协作方式关系更直接。然后T8 Build knowledge dissemination pipeline要等knowledge repo建好后再开始。
收到，修正M2的依赖为after collab_agree。还有T10 Maintain data infrastructure，它要等seedcase完成后开始，持续到2030年，和T5、T9一样。现在所有section和依赖关系都核对完毕，图可以定稿了。
